creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu 19 mar 09 at 14:25:06 +0100, Pav Lucistnik <pav@FreeBSD.org>
 wrote:

> Thierry, what's the status on this one? I see libGL-7.3 comes with it's
> own osmesa.h header, is this port still needed?

Good catch, Pav!

ATM, OSMesa is disabled on libGL, but it could be enabled by a KNOB and

CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--enable-gl-osmesa

(and maybe --with-osmesa-bits=BITS to change the default depth).

If enabled, this port builds libOSMesa. Thus, we can close this PR and
replace it by a slave port of graphics/libGL, or maybe just build it by
default.

Best regards,
-- 
Th. Thomas.
